sections.paragraph:
προβλέπω impf. προέβλεπον; 1 aor. προέβλεψα (Dionys. Hal. 11, 20; somet. in Vett. Val. [ind.]; Kaibel 326; Ps 36:13)

① act. to see beforehand, foresee ὧν (=τούτων, οὓς) προέβλεπεν τὸ πνεῦμα κυρίου B 6:14. ἐν πνεύματι προβλέψας εἰς τὸν Ἰησοῦν looking forward in the spirit to Jesus 9:7. προβλέψας, ὡς foreseeing that 3:6.

② mid. to make provision for, provide (in the act. Kaibel 326) τὶ περί τινος select or provide someth. for someone Hb 11:40.—M-M s.v. προβλέπομαι.

impf. impf. = imperfect

aor. aor. = aorist

somet. somet. = sometimes

ind. ind. = index

Kaibel Kaibel = Epigrammata Graeca ex Lapidibus Conlecta, ed. GK.—List 3

act. act. = active

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

someth. someth. = something

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 866
